# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Resources:
  MyEC2Instance1:   # Name of EC2 instance resource (e.g., Amazon Machine Image)
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance    
       ... your instances here...     
        
  VolumeGroupForEBSData :                      # Cloudformation logical id for Ebs volume group - it's a good practice to use Logical ID if name isn’t available or too long.   (e.g., MyVG)       
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
      ... your Volumes here...    
        
  VolumeForEBSData1 :                         # Cloudformation logical id for Ebs volume - it's a good practice to use Logical ID if name isn’t available or too long.   (e.g., MyVol)       
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment     ... your attachments here...  .      AvailabilityZone : us-west-1a       # specify the availability zone in which to launch our EC2 instance for example..(AWS Region specifics or Ec2Instance.AVZ)       
   AttachTime: auto                      ....your attch time.....     DeviceName:/dev/xvdf... your device name....  (You must refer this as per the configuration of ec2instance under create-ec2-instances resource type.. e.g., /aws-us-west-1b)
   NoDevice: true                     ....your devicename.....    DeleteOnTermination : false         ... your EBS volume configurations here...     SnapshotId  snapid....(You must refer this as per the configuration of ec2instance under create-ec2-instances resource type.. e.g., /aws-us-west-1b)
   VolumeSize: '50'                     ....your volumesize.....    ... your volume configurations here... (In increments up to 64GB, in multiples of 8 GB.)          VolumesPerInstance : One                   DeleteOnTermination = true/false......(The same as above parameter)
